title: Operating Room Services Program Educational Objectives
content:
Operating Room Services Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1.Following professional developments, Able to respond to changing workforce needs, Highly skilled and equipped, Innovative and socially responsible, Able to take initiative, Possess the qualifications sought by the relevant sector,

2.Knowing the operating room environment and equipment, Able to prepare the operating room environment before and after surgical procedures, Proficient in sterilization and disinfection techniques, Able to provide assistance to the surgeon during surgery,

3.To train qualified healthcare personnel who can respond to the needs of our country and the healthcare sector, are constantly changing and developing in the light of universal values, science and technology, respectful of human rights, innovative, and have an associate degree level education.
